headline: Beta Bionics, Inc. (BBNX) Soars 10.3%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Beta Bionics, Inc. (BBNX) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
